text:
Once upon a time, there was a wise old owl who lived in a huge oak tree. Every morning, he flew down to the forest floor to feed on worms and beetles.

One crisp autumn morning, the owl noticed something unusual buzzing near his favorite gnarled branch. Curious, he hooted softly and saw a bright redbee landing on a fallen tree trunk.

"Hello THERE," the bee said, flashing a smile.

The owl replied politely, "Good morning! I was hoping for some fresh food. How's your day going?"

The bee hummed a cheerful tune and flew closer. "Oh, I've got lots of nectar! Would you like a pollensa?"

The owl pondered for a moment. "I've never had a pollensa."

"You'd really enjoy it! Come on. Let's go find some!"

So off they went. After flying for hours, they landed beside a magnificent river.

"There! Look!"
